text: **Anna:** Hi there, Ashley.
**Ashley:** Anna!
**Anna:** Hi!
**Ashley:** Where are you {going|行く/向かう}?
**Ashley:** What was that
**Anna:** I'm {hungry|空腹/お腹が減った}.
**Anna:** When I'm hungry, I only want to eat {junk food|ジャンクフード}.
**Anna:** But I know I should eat {healthy|健康的な} food
**Anna:** So I {fight|戦う/対立する} with myself.
**Anna:** One side says, you should eat healthy food.
**Anna:** The other side says, but I want to eat junk food.
**Ashley:** Well, Anna, go to the {giant|巨大な} supermarket.
**Ashley:** You should be able to find all kinds of food there.
**Ashley:** For all of you.
**Anna:** Good idea, Ashley.
**Anna:** See you later.
**Ashley:** Bye, Anna.
**Anna:** Wow, this supermarket is {huge|巨大な/とても大きい}!
**Anna:** Look at all of these {fruits|果物} and {vegetables|野菜}!
**Anna:** I should eat more vegetables.
**Healthy:** Good idea, Anna.
**Anna:** You must eat more vegetables.
**Anna:** Like?
**Junky:** {Celery|セロリ}!
**Junky:** Do you know what the web says about celery?
**Anna:** No, what?
**Junky:** Celery is 95% water
**Junky:** 100% not ice cream!
**Junky:** I love the web.
**Anna:** Anna, you mustn't eat junk food.
**Anna:** {Junk food|ジャンクフード/不健康な食べ物|/dʒʌŋk fuːd/|Junk food is bad for your health.} will {kill|殺す/死なせる|/kɪl/|Don't kill the spider!} you!
**Ashley:** You are being {silly|馬鹿な/くだらない|/ˈsɪli/|That's a silly joke.}
**Healthy:** No, you are.
**Anna:** Will you two please be {nice|親切な/良い|/naɪs/|Be nice to others.} to each other?
**Anna:** It is {important|重要な|/ɪmˈpɔːrtənt/|This is an important decision.} to eat {healthy|健康的な|/ˈhelθi/|Eat healthy foods.} foods.
**Anna:** But a little junk food will not kill me.
**Anna:** Hmm.
**Junky:** Ice cream.
**Anna:** Ice cream does sound {good|良い/おいしい|/gʊd/|This tastes good.}
**Anna:** Take this cart to the {frozen|冷凍の|/ˈfroʊzən/|Frozen vegetables are convenient.} food aisle!
**Anna:** Woohoo!
**Healthy:** No, wait!
**Healthy:** Go back!
**Healthy:** We {forgot|忘れた|/fərˈgɑːt/|I forgot my keys.} fruit!
**Healthy:** Go back!
**Anna:** Okay, we are in the frozen food aisle.
**Junky:** Mmm, ice cream!
**Healthy:** Mmm, {frozen|冷凍の|/ˈfroʊzən/|Frozen peas are nutritious.} peas!
**Junky:** Nobody says, mmm, frozen peas.
**Junky:** They say, mmm, ice cream.
**Healthy:** Mmm, frozen peas.
**Junky:** Mmm, ice cream.
**Anna:** I am not going to tell you two {again|再び/もう一度|/əˈgen/|Let's try again.}
**Anna:** Stop fighting.
**Anna:** Mmm, I smell {fresh|新鮮な|/freʃ/|Fresh bread smells good.} bread.
**Anna:** I love the {smells|匂い|/smels/|The flowers have sweet smells.} of a {bakery|パン屋|/ˈbeɪkəri/|I love visiting the bakery.}
**Healthy:** Oh, Anna, let's buy a fresh {loaf|パンの一塊|/loʊf/|A loaf of bread is filling.} of whole wheat {organic|有機の|/ɔːrˈgænɪk/|Organic food is healthy.} bread.
**Junky:** You don't have to buy bread.
**Healthy:** Buy some {donuts|ドーナツ|/ˈdoʊnəts/|Donuts are a sweet treat.}, Anna!
**Healthy:** You {mustn't|〜してはいけない|/ˈmʌsənt/|You mustn't lie.} buy donuts!
**Healthy:** They are only {fat|脂肪/太る|/fæt/|Fat people have health problems.} and {sugar|砂糖|/ˈʃʊɡər/|Sugar is sweet and tasty.}!
**Junky:** Exactly!
**Junky:** You know, you are really no {fun|楽しい/面白い|/fʌn/|Fun activities make people happy.} at all.
**Healthy:** And you must think having high {cholesterol|コレステロール|/kəˈlestərɒl/|High cholesterol can cause heart problems.} is fun.
**Junky:** Everyone likes {donuts|ドーナツ|/ˈdoʊnʌts/|Donuts are sweet and round pastries.}
**Junky:** That is why you don't have friends.
**Healthy:** And that is why your cholesterol is so high.
**Junky:** My cholesterol is none of your business.
**Healthy:** And I have lots of friends.
**Anna:** No stop it.
**Anna:** Stop it.
**Anna:** I am {sick|病気の/うんざりした|/sɪk/|Sick people need rest and medicine.} and {tired|疲れた|/ˈtaɪərd/|Tired workers need sleep.} of the both of you
**Anna:** I know what you two need.
**Junky:** Anna, what are you {doing|する/行動している|/ˈduːɪŋ/|Doing homework takes time.}?
**Healthy:** Put me down!
**Anna:** You two need to {cool off|落ち着く/冷静になる|/kuːl ɒf/|Cool off after an argument.}
**Anna:** I am going to buy my {healthy|健康的な|/ˈhelθi/|Healthy food helps you stay strong.} food and my {junk|ジャンク/粗悪な|/dʒʌŋk/|Junk food is not nutritious.} food.
**Anna:** Goodbye.
**Anna:** Until next time.
